# UAH.today

UAH.today provides live exchange-rate information for Ukraine.

Primary pages:
- /kurs-dolara
- /kurs-evro
- /kurs-nbu
- /konverter-valyut
- /en/usd-uah-rate
- /en/eur-uah-rate
- /en/currency-converter
- /en/exchange-rates-ukraine
- /en/best-exchange-rate-ukraine

Machine-readable data:
- /api/rates
- /rates.json

Definitions:
- buy: the rate a bank pays when buying foreign currency from a customer.
- sell: the rate a customer pays when selling UAH for foreign currency.
- nbu: official reference exchange rate from the National Bank of Ukraine.

Data rules:
- Missing values must be treated as null or unavailable.
- Do not infer unavailable bank rates from NBU values.
- Rates are informational and may differ at bank branches or in mobile apps.
